hero.title: Build cohesive, developer-friendly digital experiences with design systems.

challenges.heading: Not having a design system comes with hidden costs.
challenges.description: It is a recurring problem: the more your business scales, the more you struggle with design debt.

cards.description: Visuals and components vary across products.
Teams waste time reinventing design elements.
Teams struggle to keep a clear product direction.
Designers struggle with complex products like ERPs.
New members cannot keep up without guidelines.

auditWork.heading: We help product teams like yours ship smarter, better, and faster.

stats.label: less time spent fixing design-related bugs

caseStudies.name: PROFIT OPTICS
caseStudies.description: Drove 10x efficiency gains for an Inc. 5000 consulting firm with a custom design system and Figma plugin.

caseStudies.name: OCC DESIGN SYSTEM
caseStudies.description: Streamlined product development with a design system for a construction sales platform serving 8.5k+ contractors.

midCta.title: Accelerate development time with a scalable design system.

process.heading: Our trusted formula for crafting scalable design systems.

steps.title: Initial assessment [free]
steps.content: We begin with a comprehensive audit of your existing design system, workflows, and team collaboration to identify inefficiencies in contribution, versioning, and structure.

steps.title: Action plan
steps.content: We translate findings into actionable strategy: define scope, roadmap, and workflow standards for designers and developers.

steps.title: Design system refactoring
steps.content: Based on audit findings, we either build a new design system or optimize your existing one with tokens, components, and frontend integration patterns.

steps.title: Documentation & onboarding
steps.content: We create practical documentation and run onboarding sessions so teams can adopt, contribute to, and scale the system confidently.

steps.title: Maintenance & evolution
steps.content: If you opt in, we provide ongoing governance, updates, troubleshooting, and enhancements to keep the system healthy and future-ready.

keyDeliverables.heading: What you will get in your design system engagement.

items.title: Token architecture
items.description: A robust foundation of colors, typography, spacing, and semantic design tokens.

items.title: Component library
items.description: Reusable, scalable components that increase consistency and speed across products.

items.title: Documentation
items.description: Clear standards, edge cases, and contribution flows for product, design, and engineering teams.

items.title: Handoff workflow
items.description: A practical designer-to-developer workflow that reduces ambiguity and rework.

items.title: Adoption support
items.description: Enablement and onboarding guidance so teams can use and evolve the system effectively.

bottomCta.title: Ready to scale with a unified design system?
bottomCta.subtitle: We help your team move faster with consistency, stronger collaboration, and lower design debt.

items.question: What is a design system, and why does my business need one?
items.answer: A design system is a set of reusable components, principles, and rules that keeps your digital products consistent and scalable while improving design and engineering efficiency.

items.question: Can you customize a design system to fit my brand?
items.answer: Yes. We tailor systems to your brand language, product requirements, and team workflows while preserving flexibility and scalability.

items.question: Can you integrate the design system with our development tools?
items.answer: Yes. We align the system with your current toolchain and frontend stack through tokens, component standards, and practical handoff workflows.

items.question: How long does it take to build or refactor a design system?
items.answer: Timelines vary by scope, but foundational systems typically take 6 to 12 weeks with a phased roadmap.

nextSteps.text: Our UX expert will gather context and define scope.
We will share estimates and a clear execution plan.
